summary: Adjusted the opening sentence so Chapter 12 enters through Draco's counting action rather than the same place-definition scaffold used by the adjacent boundary opening. The chapter's body and closing already carried the required continuity cleanly, so no further seam edits were made.
edits: Reframed the opening line around Draco counting the walk from the guest wing to the library, preserving the moving-distance beat while differentiating the chapter's entry construction from the adjacent opening.
